programme.title: La viuda de blanco

programme.title: La viuda de blanco

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le cuenta todo lo que ha pasado a Basilio, éste le pregunta porque sigue con la farsa y él le dice que así a su familia no le faltará nada y porque se enamoró de Fernanda. Humberto comienza a desconfiar de Fabiola.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora pone en marcha su venganza contra Lorenzo y su familia, todo por un juego de lealtades y traiciones entre Vanesa y Natalia. Aurora le dice a Martín que no puede amarlo porque está enamorada de otro hombre, aunque se trata de un amor imposible.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora confiesa que Martín no es parte de su venganza, a pesar de los planes de Vanesa. Lorenzo y Aurora se citan y ella le hace leer un diario que supuestamente escribió su mamá. Martín pasa la noche con una desconocida, que resulta no serlo tanto.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We prepare a Thai-inspired beef stir-fry and share a recipe for great potstickers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When it comes to apple desserts, apple pie may be the most popular, but it's also one of the most involved. Fortunately, when you don't want to fuss with pie but you still want that comforting combination of apple and pastry, there are other options.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon Bundt cake, glazed with a snowy white icing, is an elegant dessert but is often lacking in lemon flavor. Key lime pie is another favorite, but transporting this pie and it's wobbly filling, can be tricky. We set out to solve both these problems.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.desc: Kakyoin tries to convince the others that the baby is a Stand user, but they merely start to doubt his sanity. Unable to persuade his friends, Kakyoin resorts to some extreme measures.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Judgment, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and the team visit an island in the Red Sea and find Avdol's father, renewing the grief Polnareff felt over his friend's death. But perhaps there is a way he can right that wrong. Or not.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Ryou must protect three daughters in a chalet. Their capture could abort a fusion the father is doing.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A friend of Kaori, Mariko wants to pickpockets. Ryou tries to discourage her and challenges her.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A daughter needs to play a pool match: her family club is at stake. Ryou ensures fair play.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A young widow is stuck in the past. A thief is after some diamonds that ended up in her husband's collection.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and the others plan to raise the money they need by collecting the bounties placed on the Troupe.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The Phantom Troupe captures Gon and Killua.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third day of their road trip Mark Stacey visits the magnificent Ely Cathedral and his opponent Mark Hales gets excited about a sketchbook.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road trippers Mark Stacey and Mark Hales head for East Anglia in their classic car as the battle to win intensifies between them.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In this final day of their 300-mile road trip, Mark Hales gets a lesson in spying and Mark Stacey is left stunned at the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's time for Thomas Plant and James Lewis to take their classic car bargain hunting around the highlands and lowlands of Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Thomas Plant and James Lewis pick up some very unusual items as they travel across Scotland from west to east coast in their classic car.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant takes a financial gamble and James Lewis talks to animals on the third leg of their trip around Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: There's more car trouble for experts Thomas Plant and James Lewis on the fourth leg of their tour of Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the final leg of their trip Thomas Plant trades four wheels for two and James Lewis gets to the root of popular New Year's anthem Auld Lang Syne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Catherine Southon to hit the road in their classic car on a 200-mile journey to out-buy each other and outdo each other at auction. They begin in Corsham in the heart of Wiltshire and finish with an auction in Devizes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day two for Charlie Ross and Catherine Southon as they cosy up on their rain-swept journey criss-crossing southern England in the hunt for antiques to sell at an auction in Wareham, Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day three of their jaunt finds Catherine Southon and Charlie Ross wending their way along the south coast, headed for a shock at the auction in Lewes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: As Charlie Ross and Catherine Southon battle it out on day four, they take in some history on their trip from the south coast of England to London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final showdown for Charlie Ross and Catherine Southon as they embark on their last journey in the classic car, heading for auction in Rye.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a brand-new series as Thomas Plant and Philip Serrell team up for a 700-mile trip beginning in Lancashire and the Isle of Man.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow comes from Eltham Palace, an art deco gem in the leafy suburbs of south London. On a hazy summer's day, the crowds turn out in force bringing their family treasures with them.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Tonight's Antiques Roadshow brings you some of our favourite finds from the last 25 years, including updates on some stories and expert insight into others.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow comes from the colourful surrounds of Morden Hall Park in south London, where big value finds include a rare Cartier driver's watch, a tiny painting by a German impressionist and a plate designed by Pablo Picasso.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This special edition of Antiques Roadshow, marking 80 years since the start of World War II, brings fresh insights to the conflict through personal stories and family mementos.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow comes from the grounds of Salisbury Cathedral in Wiltshire, where surprises include a mysterious object linked to the Titanic, a watch with connections to early moon exploration, and an undiscovered letter written by Churchill.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow comes from the V&A Dundee, on the east coast of Scotland. Fiona Bruce uncovers the fascinating story behind the design of this landmark museum and the treasures it houses.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Lytham Hall in Lancashire finds include a rare automaton, a sketch by Lowry, a world-class watch and the medals won by Britain's first black Olympian.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This week's Antiques Roadshow comes from the stately setting of Compton Verney in Warwickshire, where surprising finds include a charming sketch by one of the nation's favourite illustrators.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow returns to Morden Hall Park in London, where the experts unearth a Faberge vanity case, a ring by one of the most innovative goldsmiths of the 20th century and a magnifying glass linked to Pablo Picasso.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Battle Abbey in East Sussex, where treasures brought along include a diamond ring that was bought for a pound, a 17th-century violin, the most valuable ever brought to the Roadshow, and a unique telegram from Hitler.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow comes from Castle Ward on the shores of Strangford Lough in Northern Ireland, where Fiona Bruce discovers that the architecture of this unusual house has something of a split personality.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Meet Lily, a wild black bear who finds herself at the centre of a passionate debate; some people want her dead; this is the latest chapter in her remarkable life.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Scientists reveal the magic behind owls' superpowers.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Elle and Inga, 17-year-old cousins from Norway, herd reindeer; they and their families accompany reindeer herds on an annual migration.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals never-before-screened secrets of giant armadillo life.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A mother moose and her calf struggle to survive in the Canadian wilderness while facing wolves, swarms of biting flies and Arctic weather.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A leopard mother and her cubs fight to survive, and resort to fishing for food, in the wilds of Botswana.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates this astonishing story of a wild cheetah family, revealing in intimate detail what it takes to turn tiny cubs into accomplished predators.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: The story of two mountain lions trying to raise their young unfolds in the Rocky Mountain range of Wyoming.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: At the jungle animal hospital, a dedicated team nurse their exotic patients back to health and prepare a troop of spider monkeys and a flock of scarlet macaws for their release.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: Rick samples the delights of couscous, tagines and mint tea in Moroccan bazaars, before heading along the old silk route to south-eastern Turkey, where he tastes the finest kebabs.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: Nigel Slater shows us how to prepare five different sweet and sour dishes.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: Nigel continues to explore successful food marriages in the kitchen.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: Nigel Slater shows us how to mix spicy flavors with something cooling.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: Nigel Slater continues his exploration of brilliant culinary combinations.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: Nigel shows a classic cinnamon, ginger and plum cake and demonstrates the unexpected such as sticky ribs and a spicy lentil stew with caramelized onions.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: Nigel transforms everyday suppers, including a dish of baked mushrooms and chestnuts and a home-grown pud of blackberry and fig pie.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: Hot apple pie and ice cream; fish with a lime and chili vinegar.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: Alternative sausage roll; Nigel's version of the traditional bread and butter dessert made with exotic spices and caramelized bananas.

programme.title: No Kitchen Required
programme.desc: On the Caribbean island of Dominica, chefs create meals that will be judged by the Kalinago community.

programme.title: No Kitchen Required
programme.desc: Michael, Madison and Kayne must summon their inner warrior to win over the Maori people in rugged New Zealand. The pressure is on native son Kayne to prove himself and honor his Maori heritage.

programme.title: No Kitchen Required
programme.desc: The chefs cook for the Palong hill people of Chiang Dao, Thailand; one chef is accused of hoarding an ingredient.

programme.title: No Kitchen Required

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A lackadaisical owner may lose more than his Irish pub if Jon isn't able to help him take charge and end the fighting among his bartenders.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A bar owner takes a less active role in his business after becoming convinced his bar is haunted.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In a struggling military bar, a distrustful owner spends her time spying on her staff instead of watching the bottom line.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A womanizing owner will lose his run-down Caribbean bar, and his wife, if he can't change his toxic behavior.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The eccentric owner of Brix Wine Bar is too busy being the life of the party to notice his business is withering on the vine.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The obnoxious behavior of two feuding brothers threatens to put an end to the storied legacy of Royal Oaks, the oldest bar and barbecue joint in Youngstown, Ohio.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After giving their artsy, irresponsible landlord a share of the bar, the brothers behind Martini Brothers Burger Bar are at their wits' end and ready to call Jon for help.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Former Judas Priest frontman Tim Ripper Owens calls in Jon after discovering being a rock star and running a rock club are two very different skills.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits The Hooch, an X-rated bar where the foul-mouthed owner wastes her husband's money and constantly berates her female staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: At an Ann Arbor, MI, college alumni bar, Jon is forced to deal with a hotheaded owner whose fiery temper keeps his staff on edge and his million-dollar debt on ice.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A former psychologist turned bar owner attempts to run a Detroit jazz club, but her interfering family and lazy staff have her seeking counseling from Jon.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In a Bar Rescue first, Jon helps a failing strip club saddled with a disinterested staff, a skeevy vibe, and an off-putting name: Chix on Dix.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The feud between the owners of Mac & Chester's SRO has led to a bifurcation of their business and attracted a dysfunctional, rowdy clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of The Gallopin' Goose ruined his marriage and his bar's reputation when he had an illicit affair that resulted in a child.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Jesse Majors, the beautiful motorcycle racer that Matt fell in love with, returns, putting strain on Matt and Summer’s relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An ad hoc reunion of elite 1950s lifeguards, the "Red Knights," triggers a bar brawl and Ben's resignation. Meanwhile, Mitch helps deliver a baby when the mother goes into premature labor while swimming at the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Baywatch lifeguards travel to San Diego for a week where Summer is haunted by the hotel's legendary ghost. CJ grows attached to an orphaned dolphin at Sea World. And Mitch is stranded at sea with his brother when their sailboat capsizes.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Adrift in the ocean with his semi-conscious brother, Mitch struggles to keep himself and Buzzy alive through the long, cold night. CJ unites an orphaned dolphin with its injured mother, and Summer becomes obsessed with a passionate ghost.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A beautiful woman and her plain sister compete for Mitch's affection with perilous results. Matt confronts the sudden onset of a paralyzing fear of sharks, that may in reality be a far different fear.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An investigative reporter is working on a story which details the sale of U.S. military technology by businessman Edward Falcon. The story is so incriminating that her life is put at risk. Can the Baywatch team help her get out alive?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Country and Western superstar Jessie Lee Harris takes a detour from his concert schedule and pays a visit to Baywatch in search of his estranged wife and son

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When severe cutbacks put the Baywatch lifeguards’ jobs in jeopardy, Matt and Summer volunteer to guard as civilians. But can they convince the county commissioners to increase the budget before lifeguards are laid off?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie Holden spends a week with the Coast Guard to help them crack a dangerous arms smuggling ring.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt doesn't know whose story to believe when he tries to reunite a runaway teen and her frantic father. Meanwhile, Stephanie must choose between Mitch and Scott.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer desperate for a new TV series idea observes a rescue on the Baywatch beach and realizes that a television series based on lifeguarding is perfect, sending Baywatch headquarters into a tizzy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After a minor earthquake, a geological survey team arrives at Baywatch to place an underwater seismometer in the Malibu fault. Hobie has an argument with his father about his future.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie and the geological team are trapped underwater by a massive earthquake! Hobie's and Jackie's lives hang in the balance. It is up to the Baywatch team to save them before it's too late!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After a recent earthquake which almost took his life, Hobie leaves California to live with his mother in Ohio. When they both show up at headquarters a few weeks later Mitch is surprised, especially when he hears the reason they are there.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Interim Heavyweight World Champion-ship is up for grabs as Tim Johnson collides with Fedor Team protege Valentin Moldavsky. Also Liz 'Girl-Rilla' Carmouche returns to the Bellator MMA cage to battle undefeated Japanese sensation Kana Watanabe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: World Champions collide as Juliana Velasquez looks to make the first defense of her Bellator MMA Women’s Flyweight World Championship when she takes on Bellator Kickboxing Flyweight World Champion Denise 'Miss Dynamite' Kielholtz.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator G.O.A.T. Patricio Pitbull puts his Featherweight World Championship on the line against undefeated sensation AJ 'Mercenary' McKee in the $1,000,000 Bellator MMA Featherweight World Grand Prix Finals in a matchup literally years in the making.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: 6-time MMA World Champion Gegard 'The Dreamcatcher' Mousasi puts his Bellator MMA Middleweight World Championship on the line against the division’s top-ranked contender, tenacious submission specialist John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls, South Dakota where heavyweight MMA icons collide as French knockout artist Cheick Kongo takes on Russian destroyer Sergei Kharitonov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in San Jose as Former Bellator MMA Light Heavyweight World Champion Phil 'Mr. Wonderful' Davis welcomes Yoel 'Soldier of God' Romero to the Bellator cage as the Cuban sensation makes his highly anticipated promo-tional debut.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: A highly anticipated rematch between former World Champion Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima and human highlight reel Michael 'Venom' Page takes center stage in London, and fast-rising Irish star Leah 'The Curse' McCourt battles Jessica 'Black Widow' Borga.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Light Heavyweight World Champion Vadim Nemkov puts his belt on the line against Lithuanian sensation Julius Anglickas in the main event, while Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader takes on Corey 'Overtime' Anderson in the co-main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Last Emperor' comes home for Bellator MMA’s first event in Russia as MMA Heavy-weight G.O.A.T Fedor Emelianenko enters the cage for one of the final fights of his historic career to take on one of the division’s top contenders, #2 ranked Tim Johnson.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Katlynn, Zach & Amber say dad Todd prioritizes everything over them: job, wife & new family. They say their dad missed weekend visits, failed to pay child support & even wrote a letter denouncing his parental rights. Could Todd do more or just a bad rap?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julia & daugther Olivia, now 22, say Olivia's newborn daughter was taken illegally. Jyllian, who adopted Olivia's daughter, promised to provide pictures of the little girl & an opportunity to be part of her life. Jyllian says the adoption was legal. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2012, Amanda accused her ex-husband, George, a U.S. Army veteran, of molesting her then 7-year-old daughter, & he was sentenced to life in prison. George's parents, Harold and Cindy, believe their son was wrongfully convicted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melanie says her 19-year-old daughter's boyfriend, Michael, is a drug-abusing gangbanger. What would cause her to have such a negative opinion of him? Learn why Michael initially agrees to a drug test, and then refuses. Will he break down and take it?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jodie says since husband Edwin won $1.66 million in a lottery pool, he's angry, distant, secretive & the marriage is in trouble. Edwin says problems started way before his money win. The couple talks to Dr. Phil wondering if their marriage can be saved.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Monster-In-Law is back! Khalood confessed to calling her son-in-law, Steve, a "loser" and "dumbass" and lacing his drink with a laxative! Does she still say Steve is incapable of supporting a family? Hear what Steve’s mom has to say about the feud!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Jenaye posted an emotional video online about uncovering her husband James's infidelity she never imagined it would go viral. Discovering James slept with his hairstylist on their fifth anniversary, Jenaye says divorce might be the best option.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 1992, 17-year-old Shawna was robbed while at work. Jerrie, 14, held her at gunpoint demanding money: the gun went off, destroying Shawna's jaw. Shawna, now 39, and Jerrie, out of prison, meet on Dr. Phil’s stage for the first time since the shooting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie's husband, Brian, was in a tragic work accident, falling from a 68-foot crane. Paralyzed from the knees down, she says Brian treats her & son Jacob, 13, like slaves not family. Their marriage has changed; Brian says it's too painful to even move.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: On Facebook, unexpected things happen, like reuniting with a loved one or being fired after posting an inappropriate photograph. It can also be a lifesaver, offering a human connection when all seems lost. Dr. Phil delves into a story that made headlines.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meet 15-year-old Marie who says she is now pregnant after running away three times. Dr. Phil confronts Marie about a prenatal regimen, her plan and ensuing drama over a pregnancy test request. Dr. Phil and the family discuss pregnancy test results. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monet Monico, 19, was fast becoming an acting & singing sensation, but just 2 years later, her family says the Hollywood hopeful has become a homeless heroin addict. Facing her family for the first time in 6 months, will Monet accept help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Melissa and her mother, Michelle, who say time is running out for 14-year-old Destoni. Melissa says her daughter’s outrageous behavior will land her in jail, or even worse, get her killed. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you imagine getting an inheritance, you might assume all your financial problems would be solved. But can the money be more trouble than it's worth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany wrote to Dr. Phil devastated to discover that her boyfriend, the man she loves & with whom she is having a baby, leads a double life. But Dr. Phil discovered that Brittany was leaving out important details. What his team uncovered is shocking!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Patriota herido
programme.desc: Cuando el asesinato de un compañero conmociona al equipo, Gibbs descubre un sorprendente vínculo con el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Regla 51
programme.desc: Gibbs se dirige a México para enfrentarse a sus demonios y tomar una decisión sorprendente, en el final de la séptima temporada de NCIS.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños rituales de asesinato conducen al equipo en busca del asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al sur para investigar a un veloz asesino cuya firma coincide con la de un asesino en serie de hace 30 años. Además, el equipo descubre que alguien los sigue e imita los crímenes que ya han resuelto.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Reid descubre que su novia fue secuestrada por su acosador, él y el equipo de la UAC se reúnen para encontrarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A sangre fría
programme.desc: Cuando un teniente de la policía de Nueva York, recientemente retirado y bien considerado, es acusado de disparar a un grupo de posibles asaltantes en el metro y posteriormente desaparece, Frank debe enfrentar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El camino al infierno
programme.desc: Danny debe determinar quién asesinó a un hombre cuando varias mujeres que trabajaron para él se atribuyen el mérito.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Erin se siente abrumada por la culpa después de que un hombre al que liberó es acusado de matar a un policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el estreno de la octava temporada, con Paloma Reynosa aún suelta, Gibbs debe tomar medidas desesperadas para proteger a sus seres queridos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El secuestro de una niña se convierte en algo más grande cuando su abuelo complica la investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando los motivos de un atentado contra una técnica de explosivos la relacionan con un asesinato, el equipo del NCIS investiga su muy reservada vida personal.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight badasses in the country to battle head to head on his ranch. The last man standing takes on the Skullbuster obstacle course for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve welcomes his first eight women to the ranch to compete in head to head competition. They'll face Trench Warfare, the Pulverizer, and the Junkyard to earn the right to take on Steve's Skullbuster and a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: The power of the beards invades the Broken Skull Challenge as eight tough-as-nails male athletes compete in Snatch, Stacked and Chained up for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight new women come to the Broken Skull Challenge to go head to head in Snatch, Stacked and Chained Up. The winner goes on to get a shot at Steve's Skullbuster and his $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Fresh meat go head to head at the Broken Skull Challenge as eight new men take on Possession, Loaded and the Grip & Rip to try and prove they are the toughest badass in the country and take home $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight new women arrive at the ranch to fight head to head in Possession, Loaded and Grip & Rip to earn a spot in Steve Austin's Skullbuster and a shot to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight new male competitors go through three grueling rounds of competition, including Drag Race, Bagged, and Blowout. One of them will earn the right to take on the Skullbuster, and a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin brings in his toughest group of women yet to compete in Drag Race, Bagged, and Blowout. Only one will earn the right to take on his Skullbuster and a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: The last group of elite male athletes comes to Steve Austin's ranch in search of the $10,000 prize. After battling through Trench Warfare, Pain Train and Barreled, only one will have a shot at the Skullbuster.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: It's the final episode and Steve Austin has saved his best for last. Who will go home with the $10,000 grand prize? Find out on the Broken Skull Challenge.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Twenty- four wild Southerners descend on a picturesque lakehouse in Georgia with $100,000 reasons to win big. But, only one team will split the payday.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Bullets fly as the rednecks shoot their way through another difficult challenge. As a new power couple emerges in the game, another team's new romance is put in jeopardy as they face elimination in The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rednecks must face their fears as the challenge takes them to new heights. A newly formed team must learn how to work together both on and off the playing field.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: An action-packed challenge sends the teams flying and lands one player in the hospital. Margaret continues to alienate the rest of the house while Cowboy and Cody almost come to blows.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Watching football turns a couple against each other, a cop gets fed up with a repeat shoplifter, and a man tries to swallow a bag of marijuana before officers find it.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Following a brief pursuit, the desperate driver bails out of the vehicle and flees on foot. An officer responds to an assault call. When a dog owner returns home, she's informed of her dog's mayhem and given a verbal warning and citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young girl may be the victim of a sexual assault. An officer spots a speeding motorcycle and attempts a routine stop. Officers serve a violation of domestic violence warrant on an inebriated guest at a local hotel.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Detectives stop a vehicle leaving a known drug house and find a loaded concealed gun while searching one of the passengers. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man apologizes profusely after leading an officer on a foot chase, a passenger in a car chase tells conflicting tales, and police find a wanted man on a roof.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vigilant neighbor calls the police when he sees a man robbing a liquor store, and a driver refuses to pull over while driving his new friend's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man who threatened his neighbors redirects his anger toward the deputies, and a driver in crisis puts the lives of others on the line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress before paramedics arrive to treat him. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers set up a sting designed to capture unsuspecting bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a routine traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer pulls over a vehicle after observing a suspected prostitute enter the vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman with warrants tries to avoid jail time, deputies confront a hit-and-run suspect, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building, killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a single human bone is discovered in the desert, Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of the skeleton.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates a possible suicide at a high-profile construction site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Descubren que el niño tiene hermanos que también están en peligro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, para su competencia final, tiene que determinar cómo fue asesinado el Sherlock Holmes de un club de Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick investiga el asesinato de un hombre por alguien que aparentemente necesita una silla de ruedas. Nick investiga el asesinato de una mujer en la subcultura del narcocorrido, canciones sobre asesinatos relacionados con las drogas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick y Nick encuentran el cadáver de dos mujeres en unas obras enterradas bajo el alquitrán.El turno de swing se adentra en el mundo de las novias extranjeras por correo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofía, Sara y Greg investigan la desaparición de una mujer que volvía a casa tras una noche de fiesta con una amiga después de que su coche abandonado aparezca en el arcén de una autopista.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un importante jugador de Las Vegas aparece muerto, Ecklie ordena a ambos equipos que investiguen el caso. El hombre que tenía secretos sobre todos en Las Vegas tenía uno muy grande propio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick y Warrick investigan un cadáver gravemente mutilado en el bosque. Grissom, Sarah y Greg intentan determinar cómo fue asesinado un hombre en una habitación de hotel. Esto les lleva a una convención de mujeres grandes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie ataca de nuevo, y el equipo de CSI prueba una nueva tecnología utilizando pruebas de un asesinato anterior.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Greg investigan un incendio forestal que mató a un hombre y quemó gravemente a una mujer. Catherine, Nick y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una familia de tres miembros asesinada en su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una noche, cuatro casos. Grissom y Brass consiguen un Hummer robado y un puesto de tacos. Warrick atrapa a una chica muerta. Sara y Greg consiguen un culturista muerto. Nick consigue un chico muerto encontrado en un banco.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass viaja a Hollywood, California, para intentar localizar a la amiga de su hija distanciada, mientras intenta reavivar algún tipo de relación con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara investigan el asesinato de un paciente de un hospital psiquiátrico y rápidamente reducen los sospechosos a un puñado de otros pacientes y miembros del personal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre (Alan Rosenberg) con el que Catherine flirteó en un bar reaparece en su vida como sospechoso en la investigación del asesinato de una mujer a la que dispararon y mataron.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos amorosos estudiantes de primer año son encontrados muertos en un saco de dormir en un dormitorio, y Sara y Greg se topan con un callejón sin salida tras otro mientras intentan determinar por qué fueron asesinados los estudiantes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An escaped prisoner takes Natalia hostage and tells her a shocking secret about his crimes. Horatio Caine and the rest of CSI the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine has decided to protect a mixed martial arts fighter from his dangerous brother who recently escaped from prison.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a co-ed dead in a hot tub, they investigate a case marked by jealousy, psychosis and college roommates.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine chases down a mysterious murder suspect, he discovers that the man's entire life is an elaborate charade.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After Horatio captures the last prison escapee, their transport plane crash lands, and they discover the fugitive has more planned than a getaway.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and Natalia’s lives hang in the balance as Horatio stands between Natalia and certain death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs are led into the sexy world of male gigolos when they uncover an unusual murder weapon.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A tornado touches down on a murder scene, damaging the evidence and putting Ryan and Walter in grave danger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team chases a sadistic killer who takes women’s eyes, and a new nemesis challenges Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio protects a Mexican police chief from the mysterious assassin who killed her husband.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In a deserted mansion, the CSIs find a body hanging that appears to have been killed by a vampire.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high-stakes poker game is disrupted by a masked assassin, leaving one player dead and the CSIs baffled.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio finds another corpse with missing eyes, everything points to his nemesis, The Taunter – except he has an airtight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when three convicted murderers are released from prison and someone starts killing them one by one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio llega rápidamente al lugar cuando asaltan a un camión blindado que transporta 3.2 millones de dólares en un atrevido atraco en el centro de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin se convierte literalmente en parte de la escena de un crimen después de robar un guante de látex para agregarlo a su colección forense personal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un periodista escurridizo es el único testigo de un asesinato y Horatio sospecha que puede estar buscando una historia mucho más importante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a tiros a un oficial de policía mientras estaba en el trabajo, el equipo de CSI rastrea a los que él vio esa noche y se entera de que recogió a una prostituta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga las vidas de quienes viven en un aeroparque de lujo después de que una avioneta se estrella en un lugar popular de Miami Beach.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran muerto a un guardia de seguridad después de que suenan disparos en el concierto de la estrella del rap 10-Large y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la evidencia de una investigación de asesinato lleva al equipo de CSI a creer que el asesino puede estar en Nueva York, Horatio lleva su investigación a la Gran Manzana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran estrangulada a una actriz de cine para adultos en el parque y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar y encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una peligrosa investigación lleva al equipo de CSI por un camino traicionero que conducirá a la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La vida de Yelina está en peligro cuando Horatio y el equipo de CSI trabajan en un caso para condenar a un rapero sospechoso de un tiroteo al estilo de Miami desde un auto en movimiento.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un flash mob surge en un campo de golf privado, ¿el grupo de estudiantes estaba allí para esconder un cuerpo o para dejar uno?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate two seemingly unrelated deaths, their separate trails of evidence lead to a surprisingly connected conclusion.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs find themselves immersed in the world of competitive video gaming when they discover a murder may be related to a high-stakes tournament.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A lab tech is murdered in a case that has similarities to a 1950’s cold case, the CSIs get a glimpse into what goes on in the shadows of the lab.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A wave of brutality threatens a small New York City community when a body is found dismembered and strategically left out on four street corners.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to a Brooklyn housing project to investigate the murder of a successful businessman who felt the pull of his old neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Mac is shot, he finds himself in limbo between life and death, as he fights for his life, it’s up to his team to bring the shooter to justice.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a fire chief – a friend of Mac’s – is killed in a blaze that used the same technique as a recently paroled arsonist.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team rushes to stop serial arsonist Leonard Brooks after he begins using fire against people from his dark past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Evidence found in photos at a crime scene on the Brooklyn Bridge sends Mac and Jo to San Francisco in search of a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators race to catch a shooter when Lindsay is injured during the attempted murder of a political candidate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates a 20-year-old case involving a missing boy when the prime suspect is found murdered on the anniversary of the boy’s disappearance.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a twisted fairy tale when a woman in a ball gown is found at the bottom of the pond outside Belvedere Castle in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a psychiatrist’s patients are being systematically murdered, the CSIs are forced to play along in a game of Clue in order to catch the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs must delve into the high-pressure world of elite prep schools when a student is murdered while studying for the SAT’S.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cadena perpetua (S7 Ep21)
programme.desc: Después de que una lluvia de disparos cruza el laboratorio de criminalística, Mac y su excompañero se convierten en parte de una venganza que lleva 17 años.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Estrategia de salida (S7 Ep22)
programme.desc: Después de una experiencia cercana a la muerte, el detective Mac Taylor está bastante decidido a cerrar su último caso sin resolver.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Imborrable (S8 Ep1)
programme.desc: En el décimo aniversario del 11 de setiembre, Mac y el equipo recuerdan momentos específicos de ese día que les quedaron grabados de forma indeleble en la mente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Hazlo realidad (S8 Ep2)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un adolescente torpe, el equipo descubre que sus esfuerzos por conquistar el corazón de una atractiva roquera punk pueden haber ido demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El caballero andante (S8 Ep3)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran el cuerpo de una hermosa joven en una Ferrari robada, la investigación conduce a una familia de ladrones de autos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oficial involucrado (S8 Ep4)
programme.desc: Una salida nocturna amistosa para tomar un trago sufre un cambio inesperado cuando Danny y sus policías novatos se ven envueltos en un tiroteo.

programme.title: Pies de Gato
programme.desc: Luis Aguilar encabeza el elenco en esta historia de una banda de bandidos alegres cuyas hazañas son más divertidas que despreciables. Continuación de "Los bandidos de Río Frío" (1954).

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una familia se reúne para festejar el día de las madres. Ante tantos problemas, una mujer hablará lo que no ha dicho por años. Esposo, hijos y nietos escucharán su cansancio y agobio silenciado por la sumisión y la obediencia impuestas.

programme.title: Pancho López
programme.desc: Un hombre es enviado a vender el ganado de un tío, pierde todo el dinero en el juego e inventa que fue asaltado.

programme.title: Los tres bohemios
programme.desc: Tres jóvenes cantantes reciben ayuda de la dueña de un restaurante y estos hacen famoso al local con su música.

programme.title: Pies de Gato
programme.desc: Luis Aguilar encabeza el elenco en esta historia de una banda de bandidos alegres cuyas hazañas son más divertidas que despreciables. Continuación de "Los bandidos de Río Frío" (1954).

programme.title: Los Galleros de Jalisco
programme.desc: Miguel Carrasco se devuelve a su ciudad natal y mata a Juan Huitron, después de que éste lo acusara de homicida. Miguel rechaza huir a pesar de que los hermanos del difunto buscan revancha.

programme.title: Pancho López
programme.desc: Un hombre es enviado a vender el ganado de un tío, pierde todo el dinero en el juego e inventa que fue asaltado.

programme.title: Único testigo
programme.desc: Cuando una joven Amish y su hijo se encuentran envueltos en el asesinato de un agente antinarcóticos encubierto, su salvador resulta ser el duro detective de Filadelfia John Book.

programme.title: La conquista del honor
programme.desc: Del director ganador del premio de la Academia Clint Eastwood y del ganador del premio de la Academia Steven Spielberg, llega la historia de los seis hombres que izaron la bandera en la Batalla de Iwo Jima, un punto de inflexión en la Segunda Guerra.

programme.title: Hacia lo desconocido
programme.desc: Mientras que el mundo observa al capitán William D. Stanaforth (Mark Strong) solo en una misión a Marte, debe de adentrarse en los lugares más oscuros de su mente y el espacio exterior para guiar a una nave defectuosa a la superficie de Marte.

programme.title: Texas rangers: los justicieros
programme.desc: Después de la Guerra Civil, Texas queda a merced de los bandidos asesinos. Un grupo de héroes inusuales lucha contra los bandidos. Sobrepasados en cantidad y armas, juntan coraje para proteger a los inocentes y hacer lo correcto.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: Dudar
programme.desc: Este cautivador drama lleno de suspenso elevado por las actuaciones de los nominados al Óscar Meryl Streep, Philip Seymour Hoffman, Amy Adams y Viola Davis, Doubt, te mantendrá en vilo.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction: tiempos violentos
programme.desc: El guionista y director Quentin Tarantino presenta a un gran elenco en Pulp Fiction, una entretenida historia de violencia y redención. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman y Bruce Willis protagonizan este fenómeno de la cultura popular.

programme.title: Te pido un taxi
programme.desc: Rodrigo está seguro de poder conquistarlas a todas, y nunca se queda con ninguna, porque para él, el amor no existe. En su juego se encontrará con Sol, quién romperá toda regla que él se ha impuesto.

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: Cómo entrenar a tu esposo
programme.desc: Una terapeuta matrimonial intenta arreglar su propio matrimonio centrándose en cómo cambiar a su marido.

programme.title: Fiebre Del Sabado Por La Noche
programme.desc: Protagonizado por John Travolta como Tony Manero, un talentoso bailarín de Brooklyn que busca escapar de su vida rutinaria a través de la música disco y las competiciones de baile, mientras enfrenta conflictos personales y familiares.

programme.title: Fama
programme.desc: Fama es la inspiradora historia de un grupo de bailarines, cantantes, músicos y actores de la Escuela Secundaria de Artes Escénicas de la Ciudad de Nueva York, y su enérgico impulso por hacer realidad sus sueños de estrellato.

programme.title: Pasos de baile
programme.desc: Una estudiante pierde a su hermana por culpa de las drogas, pero debe volver a su barrio lleno crimen, donde descubre su pasión por el baile competitivo.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza
programme.desc: En este mordaz thriller policíaco, un policía desacreditado que busca al asesino de su compañero descubre accidentalmente una conspiración gubernamental vinculada al asesinato de una mujer con un coche bomba.

programme.title: Ultimo cuerpo
programme.desc: El asesinato de un travesti despierta en el periodista Heriberto Camargo una sed de verdad. En su investigación, descubre que no es un delito aislado sino parte de una serie de asesinatos brutales de agentes de policía.

programme.title: Actos de violencia
programme.desc: Cuando su prometida es secuestrada por traficantes de personas, Roman y sus hermanos ex-militares se proponen localizarla y salvarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Hostage

programme.title: El crimen del Padre Amaro

programme.title: Veneno

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda

programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.desc: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia está muy ansiosa por llegar al pueblo de Trinidad para recobrar a sus gemelos, ellos presienten que su madre puede estar en peligro. Su exsuegra cree que ella aún está en la cárcel.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián no entiende por qué Alicia le huye después de salvarle la vida, pero él insiste en acercarse. Perfecta quiere impedir de cualquier manera que ella pueda ver a los niños.

programme.title: La estrategia de Perfecta
programme.desc: Perfecta pide ayuda cuando Alicia reclama a gritos sus derechos a las puertas de la familia Blanco, ella tiene que asumir las consecuencias de su escándalo. Un hombre misterioso la espía.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta le hace la guerra a Alicia para que no consiga ni posada, ni comida. Laurentino prepara una estocada final, como abogado de la familia Blanco quiere que ella se vaya del pueblo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia despierta de una de sus pesadillas, quiere irse de la casa de Justino Briñón, le teme al misterio que lo envuelve, pero a él le interesa retenerla. Hayde muestra desacuerdo con su madre.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother, Barbara Mullenix, in 2006. She allegedly packed her mother's bloodied corpse in a cardboard box before dumping it in California's Newport Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files
